questions.question: Peter says with the Lord a day is like how long?
questions.feedback: With the Lord a day is like a thousand years, and a thousand years like a day.

questions.question: Why does Peter say the Lord is patient about his promise?
options: He wants everyone to come to repentance
He is waiting for the temple
questions.correct: He wants everyone to come to repentance
questions.feedback: The Lord is patient, not wanting anyone to perish but everyone to come to repentance.

questions.question: Peter says scoffers will come in the last days questioning Christ's return.
questions.feedback: In the last days scoffers will come asking where is the promise of his coming.

questions.question: The day of the Lord will come like a _____ — the heavens will disappear with a roar.
questions.feedback: The day of the Lord will come like a thief.

questions.question: We are looking forward to a new heaven and a new _____ where righteousness dwells.
questions.feedback: We look forward to a new heaven and a new earth where righteousness dwells.
